title: BENECREAT 6 Pcs Glass Cylinder Vases, 10cm (H) x 8.4cm (W) Clear Hydroponic Plant Bottles, Modern Decorative Centerpieces Vases for Micro Landescape, Flower, Home, Weddings, Party
features: Package Included : You will receive 6 clear straight glass vases with a diameter of 3.3 inch/84mm and a height of 3.9 inch/99mm.
Premium Quality : The decorative vases are made of sturdy glass with cylindrical appearance, high transparency, wear-resistant and not easy to scratch, easy to clean.
Minimalist Design : The straight glass vase features a minimalist design with a neat shape and smooth lines, which is able to show off the beauty and nature of the decorations.
Multiple Uses : Transparent glass containers are perfect for flowers, greenery, succulents and floating candles, and can also be used for DIY miniature landscape crafts.
Suitable Occasions : Suitable for decorating restaurants, gardens, weddings and parties and many other occasions, also can be used as gifts for friends and relatives.
description: BENECREAT Watering Plant Vases, Clear Hydroponic Plant Cup, Micro Moss Landescape Bottle Material: High Borosilicate Glass Quantity: 6 pcs Size: about 84mm/3.3 inch in diameter, 99mm/3.9 inch high, inner diameter: 80.5mm/3.17 inch, capacity: 450ml(15.22fl. oz).
